turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, mujhe apni appointment cancel karni hai. Meri tabiyat theek nahi hai aur main aa nahi sakta.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Koi baat nahi. Pehle aap theek ho jaiye. Aapka naam aur appointment details?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Rajan Nair. Aaj shaam ko 6 baje tha. Dr. Arun Mahajan ke saath.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan dekha. Rajan Nair, aaj 6 PM, Dr. Mahajan. Cancel kar doon completely?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, aur jab main theek ho jaaunga toh nayi date le loonga.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul. Cancel ho gaya. Jab chahein call kar ke nayi appointment le lena. Jaldi sehat theek ho aapki.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Shukriya. Bahut acha service hai aapka.
